title: Accept a one-time payment with Checkout
description: Learn how to accept a one-time payment using Stripe Checkout.

steps.title: Set up product and pricing
steps.description: Create a product with pricing information for the one-time payment.

nodes.title: Create product and price
nodes.description: Create a product with pricing information.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Complete checkout
steps.description: Create a Checkout Session and complete the payment flow.

nodes.title: Create Checkout Session
nodes.description: Create a Checkout Session for a one-time payment.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Complete checkout
nodes.description: Open the Checkout Session URL to complete the payment.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

steps.title: Handle webhook events
steps.description: Listen for webhook events to confirm the payment was successful.

nodes.title: Wait for checkout.session.completed event
nodes.description: This event is sent when the customer completes the checkout.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.
